creator: itetcu@FreeBSD.org
text:
At least on my tinderboxes, the build ends with:


===>   qtemu-1.0.3 depends on package: qt4-gui>=4.2.3 - found
===>   qtemu-1.0.3 depends on package: qt4-xml>=4.2.3 - found
===>   qtemu-1.0.3 depends on package: qt4-uic>=4.2.3 - found
===>   qtemu-1.0.3 depends on package: qt4-moc>=4.2.3 - found
===>   qtemu-1.0.3 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/lupdate-qt4 - found
===>  Configuring for qtemu-1.0.3
(cd /work/a/ports/emulators/qtemu/work/qtemu && /usr/bin/env LOCALBASE=/usr/local MOC="/usr/local/bin/moc-qt4" UIC="/usr/local/bin/uic-qt4" CPPFLAGS=" " LIBS=""  QMAKE="/usr/local/bin/qmake-qt4" QMAKESPEC="/usr/local/share/qt4/mkspecs/freebsd-g++" QTDIR="/usr/local" KDEDIR="" SHELL=/bin/sh CONFIG_SHELL=/bin/sh /usr/local/bin/qmake-qt4)
env: /usr/local/bin/qmake-qt4: No such file or directory
*** Error code 127


-- 
IOnut - Un^d^dregistered ;) FreeBSD "user"
  "Intellectual Property" is   nowhere near as valuable   as "Intellect"
